title: Fps Engine Up
description: fps mods for popular block game wich you like:) over 800% more fps than vanilla!
body:
This Modpack only for an optimization block game which you like:)

 Here are the only mods to get more FPS with holding original Minecraft experience, which more optimized Vanilla version.
 Check Gallery to see differences of FPS one fabric version without mods and one with ModPack FpsEngineUp.

This ModPack created because Author has a weak laptop and  wanted to help others which have weak laptop/PC <3

For get 800% over more FPS than vanilla, download latest Fps Engine Up 1.19.4 fabric version.

And to get more optimized 1.16.5 download in CreuseForge:https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/fpsengineup

Made with love by Nasib047 with the support of his friends.
